PowerShell($js = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:3000/js/multiplayer.js' -UseBasicParsing\).Content; if\($js -match 'boss-fight-start-multi'\){Write-Output 'boss-fight-start-multi FOUND'}else{Write-Output 'boss-fight-start-multi MISSING'}; if\($js -match 'startBossFightMultiplayer'\){Write-Output 'startBossFightMultiplayer FOUND'}else{Write-Output 'startBossFightMultiplayer MISSING'}; if\($js -match 'advanceToNextFighter'\){Write-Output 'advanceToNextFighter MISSING \(should be server only\)'}else{Write-Output 'advanceToNextFighter absent \(correct\)'}; Write-Output "Size: $\($js.Length\) bytes")

PowerShell($js = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:3000/js/combat-system.js' -UseBasicParsing\).Content; if\($js -match 'isMultiplayerBossFight'\){Write-Output 'isMultiplayerBossFight FOUND'}else{Write-Output 'isMultiplayerBossFight MISSING'}; if\($js -match 'disableBossSkillButtons'\){Write-Output 'disableBossSkillButtons FOUND'}else{Write-Output 'disableBossSkillButtons MISSING'}; if\($js -match 'handleBossWhoseTurn'\){Write-Output 'handleBossWhoseTurn FOUND'}else{Write-Output 'handleBossWhoseTurn MISSING'}; Write-Output "Size: $\($js.Length\) bytes")
